message:
feat(core,abi): port RPC status-code → message lookup to core::rpc (bd-rpcerr-epic)

Lifts rpc_errstr (~22 lines, 3 callers) from rpc_abi.rs into
core::rpc as the public status_message lookup. Pure constant-table
mapping of RPC_* status codes (0..=17) to canonical glibc-shape
descriptions per <rpc/clnt_stat.h>.

New core surface:
  pub fn status_message(stat: i32) -> &'static str

Out-of-range codes return "Unknown error".

abi changes:
  - Drop inline rpc_errstr fn.
  - `use frankenlibc_core::rpc::status_message as rpc_errstr;` keeps
    the 3 call sites (clnt_perrno / clnt_sperrno / clnt_spcreateerror)
    byte-identical.

Verified via rch (CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_frankenlibc_cc_bd-rpcerr-2):
  - 4 new core::rpc unit tests pass (zero=Success, full 0..=17 non-
    empty + non-fallback, verbatim spot checks, i32 boundary out-of-range)
  - 173/173 abi lib tests pass
  - 35/35 rpc integration tests pass
  - cargo clippy -p core -p abi -D warnings clean
  - cargo fmt --check clean

Closes bd-rpcerr-epic.
